# 打电话

```json
static void json_call() {
    uint8_t data[1024] = {};
    const char* makeCall = "{\"header\": {\"version\": \"1.0\", \"id\": 0, \"type\": \"REQ\", \"timestamp\": 1617781300, \"from\": \"16100000001\", \"to\": [\"16100000002\"]}, \"payload\": {\"func\": \"MAKE_CALL\", \"content\": [0], \"result\": 0}}";
    const char* answerCall = "{\"header\": {\"version\": \"1.0\", \"id\": 0, \"type\": \"REQ\", \"timestamp\": 1617781300, \"from\": \"16100000002\", \"to\": [\"16100000001\"]}, \"payload\": {\"func\": \"ANSWER_CALL\", \"content\": [0], \"result\": 0}}";
    data[0] = 0x55;
    data[1] = 0x55;
    data[1022] = 0xFF;
    data[1023] = 0xFF;
    memcpy(data + 2, makeCall, strnlen(makeCall, 1020));
    LogInfo().hex(data, 1024) << "\n";
    memcpy(data + 2, answerCall, strnlen(answerCall, 1020));
    LogInfo().hex(data, 1024) << "\n";
}

```
